zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Paulet於1460年出生在英國哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛時，他的父親Sir John Paulet II34歲，母親Eleanor de Ros28歲。他於1474年與Alice van Hinton在英國亨廷格多史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1525年1月5日在英國英格蘭哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Paulet于1460年出生在英国哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛时，他的父亲Sir John Paulet II34岁，母亲Eleanor de Ros28岁。他于1474年与Alice van Hinton在英国亨廷格多史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1525年1月5日在英国英格兰哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛。

nameMeanings.name: Paulet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from any of several places called Paules in the provinces of Zaragoza and Huesca in Aragon, and Albacete.

variants.name: Pavlis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Despina, Nikolaos, Vasilios.
Greek: from a derivative of the personal name Pavlos (see Paul ), or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name. Compare Paules and Paulis .
Czech and Slovak (also Pavliš); Croatian (Pavliš): derivative of the personal name Pavel (Slovak commonly Pavol, Croatian commonly Pavao), an equivalent of Paul . Compare Paulis .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Paulet was born in 1460, in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, his father, Sir John Paulet II, was 34 and his mother, Eleanor de Ros, was 28. He married Alice van Hinton in 1474, in Huntingdonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 5 January 1525, in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Paulet est né en 1460, à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Paulet II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Ros, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Alice van Hinton en 1474, à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 janvier 1525, à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Paulet 1460 in Old Basing, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Paulet II 34 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Ros 28. Er hat 1474 in Huntingdonshire, England Alice van Hinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 5. Januar 1525 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Paulet è nato il nel 1460 nel Old Basing, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Paulet II, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor de Ros, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Alice van Hinton nel 1474, nel Huntingdonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 gennaio 1525, nel Old Basing, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Basing, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Pauletが1460年にイギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングで生まれた時，父Sir John Paulet IIは34歳，母Eleanor de Rosは28歳であった。1474年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアでAlice van Hintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1525年1月5日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Paulet(이)가 1460년 영국 함프실르 드 바징에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Paulet II(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Ros(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1474년 영국 헌틴그도실르에서 Alice van Hinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1525년 1월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 드 바징에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 드 바징에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Paulet nasceu em 1460, em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Paulet II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Ros, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice van Hinton em 1474, em Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 5 de janeiro de 1525, em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Paulet родился в 1460 г. в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Paulet II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Ros, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice van Hinton в 1474 г. в местности хантингдоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 5 января 1525 г. в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Paulet nació en 1460, en Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Paulet II, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Ros, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Alice van Hinton en 1474, en Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 5 de enero de 1525, en Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
